summary: Smoke test of SkillEn backend + frontend completed end-to-end. All critical backend endpoints (auth, lead capture for 5 lead types, blog list/detail/filter, admin stats/leads CRUD, admin blog CRUD with duplicate-slug 400) returned expected status codes and payloads. Frontend home, students enroll form, blog listing, blog detail page, /admin redirect to /admin/login, admin login with seeded creds, three admin tabs, and blog creation via modal all worked. Public /blog now also shows the admin-created post.
passed: POST /api/auth/login admin@skillen.in returns JWT + user; wrong password -> 401
GET /api/auth/me with bearer returns admin user; without token -> 401

POST /api/leads/contact, /hiring, /college, /mock-booking, /enroll all return saved lead with id/lead_type/created_at/status=new (using correct schemas: hiring={company_name,contact_person,hiring_requirement,number_of_positions}, college={college_name,contact_person,interested_in}, mock-booking={track,package})
GET /api/blogs returns 5 seeded published posts; GET /api/blogs/ai-skills-every-graduate-needs -> 200; unknown slug -> 404; category filter (e.g. 'Career Growth') returns matching posts
GET /api/admin/stats returns counts (total_leads, by_type, new_leads, total_blogs)
GET /api/admin/leads returns list; PATCH /api/admin/leads/{id} {status:contacted} -> {ok:true}; DELETE -> 200; without token -> 401
POST /api/admin/blogs creates post; duplicate slug -> 400; PATCH -> 200; DELETE -> 200
Home page loads with tagline 'Learn. Grow. Lead.', 3 CTAs (Explore Programs, Hire Talent, Partner With Us), stats counters present
/students enroll form submitted via UI; toast/success text visible
/blog lists seeded posts; clicking card navigates to /blog/{slug} and renders article
Admin login with admin@skillen.in / SkillEn@2026 lands on /admin; tab-overview, tab-leads, tab-blogs all present
Admin Blogs tab: New Post modal opens; bm-title/bm-slug/bm-excerpt/bm-content/bm-save fields all present; created post 'T1 Auto Post' appears in admin list (and is publicly published)

failed.issue: React hydration warning on /admin/login: nested <a> inside <a> (Logo link wrapped by another LinkWithRef in Login.jsx). Does not block functionality but should be cleaned up.
failed.evidence: Console pageerror: 'In HTML, <a> cannot be a descendant of <a>... AdminLogin > Login.jsx line 47 Logo inside LinkWithRef'

failed.issue: Review request expects GET /api/blogs/skill-launch-3 -> 200, but 'skill-launch-3' is the preview hostname, not a seeded slug; seeded slugs are playwright-vs-selenium-2026, linkedin-optimization-2026, ai-skills-every-graduate-needs, resume-mistakes-freshers-make, ace-your-first-tech-interview. Backend correctly returns 404 for skill-launch-3 and 200 for the real slugs.
failed.evidence: GET /api/blogs returned 5 slugs (none == skill-launch-3); GET /api/blogs/skill-launch-3 -> 404; GET /api/blogs/ai-skills-every-graduate-needs -> 200

action_items: Optional: fix nested <a> in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/Login.jsx (Logo already renders a Link; remove the outer Link wrapper around <Logo/>) to eliminate React hydration warning.
